_comment: Golden databases per released tag (phase2-build-plan.md P2.M3). Each entry pins the goose migration version that tag shipped and a seed of representative data valid at that schema. The forward-migration matrix restores each golden, migrates to the current schema, and asserts the data survives. Versions: v0.1.0/v0.2.0 shipped migration 3; v0.4.x shipped 8.
